summary: Excellent soundboard recording of a high‑energy 1993 Vegas show with standout jams on The Other One, Wharf Rat, Throwing Stones and more.
review: The SBD source is praised as crystal‑clear and one of the best sounding recordings of this era. The second set erupts with monster jams – The Other One, Wharf Rat, Throwing Stones and a fiery Lovelight – while the first set delivers tight, bass‑driven excitement. Reviewers rate the playing at 4.5/5 and recommend the show without hesitation.

ai_rating.rationale: The single detailed review rates both performance (4.5) and sound (5) very high, leading to an overall rating near 5 despite limited sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as the "best sounding SBD source" with no reported drop‑outs or muddiness; clear mix and strong instrument separation.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set builds a relentless jam momentum with explosive peaks and surprising twists; first set is concise yet packed with powerful bass moments.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Noted for an exceptional little guitar part at the end of Lovelight and intense interplay with Bob on Wharf Rat.
band_member_comments.Bob: Praised for hard‑jammed guitar work alongside Jerry, especially on the climax of Wharf Rat.
band_member_comments.Drums: Briefly mentioned as cut short, but no specific criticism of performance.
